## ‘Vale do Rio do Ouro’ Farm, in Alexânia-GO, owned by Mr. Wilson Plácido Gusmão. Occurrences of UFO sightings, contacts with beings and paranormal experiences reported between the years 1967 and 1969.

The report translated below brings some of these occurrences witnessed by a select group of people of good reputation and credibility  in the societies of Brasília and Goiás at the time, such as high-ranking militaries, a lawyer, an employee of the city hall of Brasília-DF, and the owner of the Farm himself, a civil servant from the State of Goiás. summary: Multiple witnesses including high-ranking military observed hat-shaped fog craft with occupants, music, perfume, and beam effects at Fazenda Vale do Rio do Ouro.
